theme.en: AI Constraints Move Through the Stack

dek.en: Export controls, memory scarcity, foundry pricing, and packaging chokepoints all show the AI build-out becoming a full-stack capacity problem. The day is less about one GPU launch than about who can secure compute, memory, tools, and policy clearance at the same time.
dek.zh: 出口管制、存储紧缺、代工涨价和封装瓶颈同时出现，说明AI建设已经变成贯穿全栈的产能问题。今天的主线不是某一款GPU，而是谁能同时拿到算力、存储、工具和政策通道。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Marvell expands its AI push with Nvidia deal and two acquisitions
title.zh: Marvell借Nvidia交易和两项收购加码AI

summary.en: Marvell is being reported as expanding its AI hardware push through a Nvidia-related deal and two acquisitions. The item matters because Marvell sits in the custom silicon, networking, and optical-connectivity path that hyperscalers need as accelerator clusters scale. The candidate record does not provide deal terms, so the signal is strategic positioning rather than a confirmed financial reset.
summary.zh: 报道显示，Marvell正通过一项与Nvidia相关的交易和两项收购扩大AI硬件布局。这件事重要，是因为Marvell处在定制芯片、网络和光互连链路上，而这些环节正是超大规模AI集群扩张所需要的。候选记录没有给出交易条款，因此这里的信号主要是战略站位，而不是已经确认的财务重估。

title.en: Qualcomm touts $15B in AI chip sales before the chips exist
title.zh: Qualcomm称AI芯片销售目标达150亿美元，但产品尚未落地

summary.en: Qualcomm is being framed as promising $15B in AI chip sales even though the referenced chips are not yet available. That makes the story a useful check on the widening gap between AI silicon demand signals and shipping hardware. For investors and customers, the question is whether Qualcomm can convert its mobile and edge AI base into datacenter-class or adjacent accelerator revenue.
summary.zh: 报道将Qualcomm的AI芯片销售目标描述为150亿美元，但相关芯片尚未实际推出。这使它成为观察AI硅片需求信号与真实出货之间差距的一个样本。对投资者和客户而言，关键问题是Qualcomm能否把移动端和边缘AI基础转化为数据中心级或相邻加速器收入。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC is reported to raise 7nm prices by up to 10%
title.zh: 报道称TSMC将7nm价格最高上调10%

summary.en: TSMC is reported to be raising 7nm chip prices by up to 10% as expansion costs build. Even though 7nm is no longer the leading edge, it remains a high-volume node for networking, AI-adjacent logic, and long-lived platform products. A price increase there would show that foundry tightness is not confined to N3/N2 capacity.
summary.zh: 报道称，TSMC随着扩产成本上升，正把7nm芯片价格最高上调10%。7nm虽然不再是最先进制程，但仍是网络、AI周边逻辑和长生命周期平台产品的重要高量产节点。若这一涨价成立，说明代工紧张并不只局限在N3/N2。

title.en: A niche manufacturing technology becomes an AI choke point
title.zh: 一项小众制造技术成为AI瓶颈

summary.en: The New York Times highlights a niche technology that has become a choke point for AI. The candidate appears in the TSMC feed, pointing to the manufacturing and advanced-packaging layer rather than model software. The broader implication is that AI supply is increasingly constrained by specialized process steps that are hard to duplicate quickly.
summary.zh: The New York Times聚焦一项已经成为AI瓶颈的小众技术。该候选项出现在TSMC相关信息流中，指向制造和先进封装层，而不是模型软件本身。更大的含义是，AI供给越来越受制于难以快速复制的专用工艺步骤。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: The Next Platform asks whether memory boom-bust cycles are ending
title.zh: The Next Platform讨论存储市场周期是否正在改变

summary.en: The Next Platform frames the memory market as potentially moving away from its old boom-bust pattern. AI demand, especially for HBM and high-value server memory, is changing the mix from commodity bit growth toward capacity that is pre-committed and strategically scarce. The key caveat is that memory remains cyclical, but the AI layer may be changing the amplitude and timing of the cycle.
summary.zh: The Next Platform将存储市场描述为可能正在脱离旧有的繁荣-萧条周期。AI需求，尤其是HBM和高价值服务器内存，正在把市场组合从通用bit增长推向被提前锁定且具有战略稀缺性的产能。需要保留的判断是，存储仍然有周期性，但AI层可能正在改变周期的幅度和节奏。

title.en: Amazon raises AI cloud prices as memory shortages tighten
title.zh: 存储短缺加剧，Amazon再次上调AI云价格

summary.en: Tekedia reports that Amazon has raised AI cloud prices again as memory-chip shortages tighten global infrastructure supply. The story matters because it turns HBM and server-memory scarcity into a visible cloud-pricing signal rather than a component-level issue. If memory remains the limiting input, accelerator availability alone will not determine AI compute costs.
summary.zh: Tekedia报道称，随着存储芯片短缺继续压紧全球基础设施供给，Amazon再次上调AI云价格。这件事重要，因为HBM和服务器内存稀缺正在从元器件层问题转化为可见的云价格信号。如果存储仍是限制性投入，仅有加速器供给并不能决定AI算力成本。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: Air Liquide ties specialty gases and materials to AI compute demand
title.zh: Air Liquide将特种气体和材料需求与AI算力扩张相连

summary.en: Air Liquide published a semiconductor materials piece linking its process-gas and materials role to AI computing demand. The story is less a single capex announcement than a reminder that advanced fabs depend on high-purity gases, chemicals, and delivery infrastructure as much as headline lithography tools. As AI capacity expands, materials suppliers become part of the bottleneck map.
summary.zh: Air Liquide发布半导体材料相关内容，将其工艺气体和材料角色与AI计算需求相连。这不是单一资本开支公告，更像是在提醒市场：先进晶圆厂依赖高纯气体、化学品和供应系统，并不只依赖头部光刻设备。随着AI产能扩张，材料供应商也会进入瓶颈图谱。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: U.S. tightens controls on China access to advanced chips and AI tools
title.zh: 美国收紧中国获取先进芯片和AI工具的限制

summary.en: A fresh policy item reports that the U.S. is tightening export controls to curb China's access to advanced chips and AI tools. The material point is the scope: controls are no longer only about finished accelerators, but also about the tooling and services that let restricted users reach frontier compute. For suppliers, that raises compliance risk across hardware, cloud, and software channels.
summary.zh: 一条新的政策报道显示，美国正在收紧出口管制，以限制中国获取先进芯片和AI工具。关键在于范围：管制不再只针对成品加速器，也覆盖让受限用户接近前沿算力的工具和服务。对供应商来说，硬件、云和软件渠道的合规风险都会上升。

title.en: Cloud bill targets the China AI compute loophole
title.zh: 云服务法案瞄准中国AI算力漏洞

summary.en: The Hawk reports on a cloud bill aimed at a China AI loophole. The policy logic is that export controls on chips can be partly bypassed if restricted users rent equivalent compute through cloud services. If enacted or tightened, this would push AI-compute compliance deeper into hyperscaler customer screening and workload governance.
summary.zh: The Hawk报道了一项针对中国AI算力漏洞的云服务法案。政策逻辑在于，如果受限用户能够通过云服务租用等效算力，那么只限制芯片出口并不完整。若相关规则落地或加码，AI算力合规将进一步深入到超大规模云厂商的客户筛查和工作负载治理中。

title.en: EU Semiconductor Alliance discusses Chips Act 2.0
title.zh: 欧盟半导体联盟讨论Chips Act 2.0

summary.en: The EU Semiconductor Alliance met to discuss Chips Act 2.0, according to the candidate feed. The next version of European chip policy is likely to focus less on announcing broad ambitions and more on closing gaps in manufacturing, packaging, design, and materials supply. It is a policy process item, but it matters because Europe is trying to keep a seat in the advanced-node and supply-security conversation.
summary.zh: 候选信息显示，欧盟半导体联盟召开会议讨论Chips Act 2.0。欧洲下一版芯片政策可能会少一些宏观目标宣示，更多聚焦制造、封装、设计和材料供应中的缺口。这是一条政策流程新闻，但重要性在于欧洲仍试图在先进制程和供应安全议题中保留位置。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Etched AI takes 80,000 square feet in Milpitas
title.zh: Etched AI在Milpitas租下80,000平方英尺空间

summary.en: Etched AI has taken 80,000 square feet in Milpitas as chip startups compete for power-intensive space. For a challenger accelerator company, real estate is not the product, but it signals a move from slideware toward labs, bring-up, and customer-support infrastructure. The size also shows that AI silicon startups are now constrained by power and facilities, not only by tape-out capital.
summary.zh: Etched AI在Milpitas拿下80,000平方英尺空间，背景是芯片初创公司争夺高功率密度场地。对一家挑战者加速器公司来说，地产本身不是产品，但它意味着公司正在从方案展示转向实验室、bring-up和客户支持基础设施。这个面积也说明AI硅片初创公司的约束不只是流片资金，还包括电力和设施。

title.en: Reed Semiconductor closes a $100M funding round
title.zh: Reed Semiconductor完成1亿美元融资

summary.en: Reed Semiconductor announced completion of a $100M funding round, according to Business Wire. The candidate record does not identify the technology focus or investors, so the item clears the challenger bar mainly on round size. In a funding market that is selective about hardware, a nine-figure semiconductor raise is still a useful signal of strategic appetite for non-incumbent silicon.
summary.zh: Business Wire消息显示，Reed Semiconductor宣布完成1亿美元融资。候选记录没有列出技术方向或投资方，因此这条新闻主要因为融资规模达到新势力筛选门槛。在硬件融资仍然挑剔的市场中，九位数半导体融资仍然说明资本对非头部硅片公司保持战略兴趣。

theme.zh: 硬件研究追逐存储局部性

dek.en: This week's strongest papers converge on moving less data: cache-resident LLM execution, sparse-GEMM dataflows, memristive arrays, photonic mappings, and tools that make hardware exploration less manual. The common thread is that AI performance is increasingly bounded by memory hierarchy, verification effort, and physical placement rather than raw multiply throughput alone.
dek.zh: 本周最有价值的论文共同指向减少数据搬移：缓存驻留LLM执行、稀疏GEMM数据流、忆阻器阵列、光子映射，以及降低人工探索成本的硬件工具。共同主线是，AI性能越来越受存储层次、验证工作量和物理布局约束，而不只是受乘法吞吐限制。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: General-purpose nonlinear approximation with linear integrated photonics
title.zh: 用线性集成光子实现通用非线性函数逼近

papers.authors: A. Mizuno, I. Takai, M. Nakai, et al.

summary.en: Mizuno et al. show an optoelectronic route for nonlinear function approximation using optical random Fourier features on a linear silicon-photonic platform. The reported demonstrations include tenth-order Legendre polynomials, special functions, activation functions, 2D nonlinear functions, and a 10D softmax layer. The work matters because photonic AI hardware is strong at linear algebra but usually struggles to host useful nonlinear operations on chip. It is still a platform result, not a complete AI accelerator.
summary.zh: Mizuno等人展示了一种光电方法，在线性硅光平台上通过 optical random Fourier features 实现非线性函数逼近。论文演示了10阶Legendre多项式、若干特殊函数、激活函数、二维非线性函数和10维softmax层。它的重要性在于，光子AI硬件擅长线性代数，但通常难以在片上承载有用的非线性运算。需要注意的是，这仍是平台级结果，不是完整AI加速器。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: Non-uniform L2 cache latency across NVIDIA L40 SMs
title.zh: NVIDIA L40各SM之间的非均匀L2缓存延迟

summary.en: Alpay and Basaran measure L2-hit latency on an NVIDIA L40 and find that it varies by physical streaming multiprocessor, spanning 222-339 cycles rather than a single nominal value near 279 cycles. Their probe resolves all 142 SMs and reports a repeatable 52% latency range, with topology patterns that also generalize to Blackwell RTX 5090. This matters for performance modeling and for side-channel-style hardware fingerprinting. The caveat is that it is a measurement study on specific devices, not a vendor-documented architectural contract.
summary.zh: Alpay和Basaran测量NVIDIA L40的L2命中延迟，发现延迟会随物理SM位置变化，并非接近279周期的单一值，而是在222-339周期之间变化。他们的探针解析了全部142个SM，并报告可重复的52%延迟范围，且类似拓扑模式也出现在Blackwell RTX 5090上。这对性能建模和类似侧信道的硬件指纹识别都重要。需要注意的是，这是一项针对特定器件的测量研究，不是厂商公开的架构契约。

title.en: Apple Neural Engine architecture, programming, and performance
title.zh: Apple Neural Engine的架构、编程与性能

summary.en: Bryngelson provides a reverse-engineered account of the Apple Neural Engine across A11-A18 and M1-M5-class systems, combining direct measurement, static analysis, runtime inspection, and firmware work. The paper documents datapaths, roofline limits, dispatch paths, program formats, weight compression, and kernel-driver protocols. It is useful because ANE is widely shipped but weakly documented, leaving researchers dependent on Core ML abstractions. The author labels claims as measured, decompile-derived, or predicted, which is important given the private interface and version fragility.
summary.zh: Bryngelson给出了Apple Neural Engine在A11-A18和M1-M5系列系统中的逆向工程分析，结合直接测量、静态分析、运行时检查和固件研究。论文记录了数据通路、roofline限制、调度路径、程序格式、权重压缩和内核驱动协议。它有价值是因为ANE出货规模很大，但公开文档很少，研究者往往只能通过Core ML抽象间接观察。作者把结论区分为实测、反编译推导和预测，这对一个私有且版本脆弱的接口尤其重要。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: SegFold: dynamic dataflow for sparse GEMM acceleration
title.zh: SegFold：面向稀疏GEMM加速的动态数据流

papers.authors: X. Wu, H. Wang, J. Cong, et al.

summary.en: Wu et al. introduce SegFold, a sparse GEMM accelerator built around fine-grained dynamic scheduling instead of a fixed inner-product, outer-product, or Gustavson-style dataflow. The design uses a memory controller to find local reuse opportunities and a merge network to remap work across processing elements for load balance. This is relevant because sparse linear algebra increasingly appears in graph workloads and compressed AI models where static dataflows leave utilization on the table. The result is a co-design proposal, so silicon area and measured power remain the next questions.
summary.zh: Wu等人提出SegFold，这是一种稀疏GEMM加速器，核心是细粒度动态调度，而不是固定的内积、外积或Gustavson式数据流。设计通过内存控制器寻找局部复用机会，并用合并网络在处理单元之间动态重映射工作以改善负载均衡。它的重要性在于，稀疏线性代数越来越多地出现在图计算和压缩AI模型中，静态数据流会留下利用率损失。该工作仍是协同设计方案，面积和实测功耗是下一步问题。

title.en: An ISA for IMPLY-based memristive processing-in-array
title.zh: 面向IMPLY忆阻器阵列内处理的指令集架构

papers.authors: L. Splittgerber, F. Seiler, N. TaheriNejad

summary.en: Splittgerber, Seiler, and TaheriNejad propose a general-purpose microcontroller architecture and RV32I-derived ISA for IMPLY-based memristive processing-in-array. The work moves beyond treating in-memory computing as a coprocessor and instead asks what a standalone ultra-low-power edge processor would need. It is a useful framing for non-volatile compute fabrics because programmability and addressing often become the real blockers. The caveat is that the summary points to architectural and circuit metrics rather than a fabricated measured chip.
summary.zh: Splittgerber、Seiler和TaheriNejad提出了一种面向IMPLY忆阻器阵列内处理的通用微控制器架构，并给出从RV32I派生的ISA。该工作不再只把存内计算视为协处理器，而是讨论一个独立超低功耗边缘处理器需要什么。对于非易失计算阵列来说，这种视角有价值，因为可编程性和寻址机制常常才是真正阻碍。需要注意的是，摘要指向架构和电路指标，而不是已流片的实测芯片。

title.en: A programmable probabilistic computer with 1,000,000 p-bits
title.zh: 包含1,000,000个p-bit的可编程概率计算机

papers.authors: N. A. Aadit, X. Zhang, S. Chowdhury, et al.

summary.en: Aadit et al. scale probabilistic computing by networking FPGAs into a one-million-p-bit Ising machine. The system performs Gibbs sampling at more than a trillion flips per second while keeping coupling weights in local on-chip memory and exchanging only one-bit boundary states. The key contribution is not just size, but the communication-frequency condition under which a partitioned machine behaves like a monolithic sampler. It is an FPGA-networked prototype, so the path to dense custom silicon remains open.
summary.zh: Aadit等人通过联网FPGA扩展概率计算，构建了包含100万个p-bit的Ising机器。系统执行Gibbs采样时超过每秒1万亿次翻转，耦合权重保留在本地片上存储中，设备间只交换1 bit边界状态。关键贡献不只是规模，而是给出了分区机器在何种通信频率条件下能表现得像单体采样器。它是联网FPGA原型，距离高密度定制硅实现仍有距离。

title.en: AI Research Systems
title.zh: AI研究系统

title.en: Cache-resident LLM inference in GB-scale last-level caches
title.zh: 在GB级末级缓存中执行缓存驻留LLM推理

papers.authors: W. Zhang, T. Gu, M. Canini, et al.

summary.en: Zhang et al. propose a cache-resident execution model for LLM inference on systems with GB-scale last-level caches. The design separates weight-centric operators from attention and KV-cache management, keeping reusable weights cache-resident while scaling KV capacity independently. This targets a real inference bottleneck: data movement rather than arithmetic throughput. The caveat is that it depends on hierarchical-memory CPU clusters and specialized runtime scheduling, so portability to GPU-first deployments is not automatic.
summary.zh: Zhang等人提出一种面向GB级末级缓存系统的LLM推理缓存驻留执行模型。该设计把以权重为中心的算子与attention和KV-cache管理分离，让可复用权重留在缓存中，同时独立扩展KV容量。它瞄准了真实推理瓶颈：数据搬移，而不是纯算术吞吐。需要注意的是，它依赖分层存储CPU集群和专用运行时调度，不能自动迁移到GPU优先部署。

title.en: SOLAR: AI-powered speed-of-light performance analysis
title.zh: SOLAR：AI辅助的速度上限性能分析

papers.authors: Q. Huang, S. Damani, Z. Ye, et al.

summary.en: Huang et al. introduce SOLAR, a framework that derives speed-of-light performance bounds from PyTorch and JAX programs. An LLM frontend translates source into an executable affine-loop IR, while deterministic passes lift that IR into einsum graphs and compute unfused, fused, and cache-aware bounds. The tool is useful because it tells model and kernel developers how far current implementations sit from architectural limits. The authors report zero observed SOL violations, but the method still depends on translation validation and workload coverage.
summary.zh: Huang等人提出SOLAR，一个从PyTorch和JAX程序推导速度上限性能边界的框架。LLM前端把源码翻译为可执行的仿射循环IR，确定性流程再将其提升为einsum图，并计算未融合、融合和缓存感知的边界。该工具有价值，因为它能告诉模型和kernel开发者当前实现距离架构极限还有多远。作者报告没有观察到SOL违规，但方法仍依赖翻译验证和工作负载覆盖范围。

title.en: EDA & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: CHIA: agentic AI for hardware/software co-design loops
title.zh: CHIA：面向软硬件协同设计循环的智能体AI框架

papers.authors: A. Cui, F. Hermida-Rivera, J. Toubes, et al.

summary.en: Cui et al. present CHIA, an open-source framework for building agentic AI hardware/software co-design workflows as directed cyclic graphs. Its library connects tools such as Chipyard, gem5, ChampSim, FireSim, Hammer, commercial ASIC CAD flows, Vivado, and evolutionary coding agents. The contribution is infrastructure: making AI-infused design loops reproducible enough to study instead of one-off demos. The paper should be read as a workflow substrate, not proof that agents can replace expert architects.
summary.zh: Cui等人提出CHIA，一个开源框架，用有向循环图来构建智能体AI驱动的软硬件协同设计工作流。其库连接Chipyard、gem5、ChampSim、FireSim、Hammer、商业ASIC CAD流程、Vivado和进化式代码智能体等工具。贡献点在基础设施：让嵌入AI的设计循环足够可复现，便于研究，而不是停留在一次性演示。应把这篇论文视为工作流底座，而不是智能体替代资深架构师的证明。

title.en: VeriPilot uses LLMs and golden models for Verilog debugging
title.zh: VeriPilot用LLM和黄金模型调试Verilog

papers.authors: Y. Wang, C. Liu, J. Zhang, et al.

summary.en: Wang et al. propose VeriPilot, an LLM-powered Verilog debugging framework that aligns a buggy design with a golden reference model and traces internal signal semantics through control-data-flow graphs. This moves beyond compiler-output prompting by giving the model a structured localization path to suspicious code regions. It matters because verification and debug consume large fractions of digital-design effort, and LLM tools need structure to be useful on real RTL. The caveat is the reliance on a golden model, which is not always available in early design.
summary.zh: Wang等人提出VeriPilot，一个LLM驱动的Verilog调试框架，通过把有缺陷设计与黄金参考模型对齐，并沿控制数据流图追踪内部信号语义来定位问题。它不只是把编译器输出交给模型，而是给模型提供结构化的可疑代码定位路径。这很重要，因为验证和调试占据数字设计的大量工作量，而LLM工具要在真实RTL中有用就需要结构约束。限制在于它依赖黄金模型，而早期设计阶段并不总是具备。
